scripts.lint:amo: npm run build:firefox && web-ext lint --source-dir dist/firefox
scripts.package:extension: npm run build:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest
scripts.sign:unlisted: npm run build:firefox && web-ext sign --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --channel unlisted
